data.title: TELA Bio Announces Strategic Board Refreshment with Four Highly Experienced Commerical Leaders to Accelerate Growth and Drive Path to Profitability; The Company Also Reports Preliminary First Quarter 2026 Revenues
data.description: A company based in Malvern, Pennsylvania known as TELA Bio, Inc. has revealed a strategic move on April 30, 2026, aimed at enhancing its operations and commercial expansion. The firm specializes in advanced soft-tissue reconstruction solutions. This plan entails a thorough overhaul of their board to pave the way for continued growth and improved performance.
Smithfield Foods announces dividend distribution for the quarter.

data.title: reAlpha (NASDAQ: AIRE) Announces AiChat Launch of Shopify Conversational Commerce Integration and AI Ticketing for eCommerce
data.description: An innovative integration for Shopify now allows seamless in-chat purchasing and AI-driven customer support through a unified conversational system. This integration streamlines the shopping experience with the ability to make purchases directly within the chat interface. The AI-powered customer support enhances user interactions by providing immediate assistance and resolving queries efficiently. Overall, this solution optimizes the shopping process and customer service with the convenience of integrated technology.

data.title: Bakkt Completes Acquisition of Distributed Technologies Research
data.description: The merging of Bakkt’s regulated institutional infrastructure with DTR’s innovative technology and compliance system aims to target the vast $44 trillion global payments market. This acquisition brings together Bakkt's secure financial platform with DTR's seamless technology, enhancing their capabilities to cater to the global demand for efficient payment solutions.

data.title: Zevia Announces May Conference Participation
data.description: In Los Angeles, Zevia PBC, known for its naturally delicious, zero sugar better-for-you beverages, disclosed that Amy Taylor, President and CEO, along with Girish Satya, CFO, will engage in forthcoming conferences. Specifically, they will feature at The Goldman Sachs Global Staples Forum on May 12, 2026, at 1:40 p.m. E.T. Zevia will also engage in investor meetings on the same day. Zevia's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ZVIA.

data.title: Twilio Stock Soars On Q1 Earnings Beat, Strong Forward Guidance
data.description: Twilio Inc (NYSE: TWLO) released its first-quarter financial results following Thursday's market close. The report showcased significant achievements for the company. Twilio's stock is currently on the rise post-earnings. Key highlights from Twilio's Q1 report include surpassing analyst expectations with revenue hitting $1.41 billion, exceeding the anticipated $1.34 billion. Additionally, the company reported adjusted earnings of $1.50 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.27 per share. CEO Khozema Shipchandler expressed that Q1 marked a crucial period for Twilio, with the highest revenue and gross profit growth rates in over three years. Year-over-year, total revenue saw a 20% increase. For more detailed information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CNFinance Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, CNFinance Holdings Limited (NYSE: CNF) disclosed that it submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This leading Chinese home equity loan provider's annual report can be viewed on its investor relations webpage at http://ir.cashchina.cn and on the SEC's site at http://www.sec.gov. For those interested, a physical copy can be obtained.

data.title: LawToolBox and SurePoint Pro Integrate Rules-Based and AI Deadlines and Dockets in Microsoft 365
data.description: LawToolBox has introduced a new feature that allows users to easily initiate a matter from their system of record with just one click. This feature enables users to track deadlines utilizing LawToolBox's rules-based calendaring for Microsoft 365 matters. Additionally, users can seamlessly schedule Dockets through AI-enhanced Document reading in Microsoft 365. This innovation was announced on April 30, 2026, in Denver.

data.title: Principal Real Estate Income Fund Announces Notification of Sources of Distribution
data.description: DENVER - The Principal Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE:PGZ) has disclosed the origin of a distribution made on April 30, 2026. The distribution totaled $0.1050 per share and was allocated to shareholders on record as of the closing of business on April 16, 2026, in accordance with the Fund's managed distribution plan. This announcement is being made in compliance with an exemptive order provided to the Fund by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Shareholders have been informed of the distribution's source via a notice dispatched to them.
US SECRET SERVICE DIRECTOR TO FOX NEWS: THE SUSPECT WAS NEUTRALIZED AT THE CHECKPOINT, NOT ON THE STAIRS.

data.title: Redwire Corporation to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) based in Jacksonville, Florida, has disclosed that it is set to release its financial report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, after the close of the market on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. To discuss the financial results for this period, the management will be hosting a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, starting at 9 a.m. ET. For those interested, the earnings conference call can be joined by dialing 877-485-3108 (toll-free) or 201-689-8264 (toll).

data.title: LIBERTY LATIN AMERICA SCHEDULES INVESTOR CALL FOR FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: Liberty Latin America Ltd. is set to disclose its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, in a morning announcement. They invite participation in an investor call at 8:30 a.m. ET, during which management will delve into the Company’s performance and operations, with potential insights into future prospects. This event will also offer a webcast and investor presentation. Liberty Latin America is listed on NASDAQ under LILA and LILAK, as well as on OTC Link as LILAB.

data.title: FIS Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Jacksonville-based FIS, a renowned financial services technology firm listed on NYSE as FIS, has revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.44 per common share. Shareholders as of June 11, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 25, 2026. FIS serves financial institutions, businesses, and developers globally, offering solutions throughout the money lifecycle.

data.title: Legendary Texas Trial Lawyer Sam Baxter Retires from McKool Smith
data.description: In Dallas on April 30, 2026, renowned lawyer Sam Baxter revealed his retirement after an impressive 56-year career at McKool Smith. Known as a Texas trial bar icon, Sam achieved significant success in court, obtaining substantial verdicts and settlements throughout his tenure. His departure marks the end of an era, leaving a legacy in the legal field.

data.title: Apple reports second quarter results
data.description: In Cupertino, California, Apple revealed its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, concluding on March 28, 2026. The tech giant reported a quarterly revenue of $111.2 billion, marking a 17% increase compared to the previous year. Diluted earnings per share also saw a boost, reaching $2.01, up by 22% year over year. Apple's CEO, Tim Cook, expressed pride in achieving the company's best March quarter to date, highlighted by the significant revenue growth and double-digit expansion in all geographic regions. Additionally, the iPhone had a successful quarter.

data.title: The Shed Announces Naming of The Darla Moore Gallery Following Transformative $25 Million Gift
data.description: On April 30, 2026 in New York, The Shed revealed that its Level 2 Gallery has been renamed to The Darla Moore Gallery. This decision came after a generous $25 million donation from Darla Moore, a founding board member and notable philanthropist. The contribution is unrestricted, signifying a significant milestone for The Shed and highlighting Moore's dedication to the institution. This substantial investment will undoubtedly have a lasting impact on the organization's future endeavors.
